section: Periodic Transaction Report - attached transaction table (NAME: Rohit Khanna)
free_text: Typed attachment table, final page. Header: "NAME: Rohit Khanna  Page 5 of 5" (handwritten 5 and 5). Same columns/amount buckets as page 2. One group subheader (black-banded row): M&R Trust Partnership. Only two data rows; the rest of the grid is blank.
